Video.summary: Normally the idea of gorging yourself exclusively with sugar for 30 days would be a hypothetical, but is it?
Video.title: Eating Sugar for a Month

Video.summary: Imagine your classroom led by AI! This video explores the possibilities and challenges of the technology.
Video.title: A.I. Teachers?

Video.summary: Explore the edge of innovation as humanity embarks on its next frontier.
Video.title: New Is The New New: Humanity's Next Frontier

Image.alt: New Is The New New: Humanity's Next Frontier
New Is The New New: Humanity's Next Frontier
New Is The New New: Humanity's Next Frontier

Video.summary: Venture beyond our solar system as we explore the possibilities and challenges of settling on an exoplanet.
Video.title: Settling an Exoplanet

Video.summary: What do we really know about black holes? Are they even black? Are they even holes? Are the escapable?
Video.title: Our Solar System Orbiting a Black Hole

Image.alt: Our Solar System Orbiting a Black Hole
Our Solar System Orbiting a Black Hole
Our Solar System Orbiting a Black Hole

Video.summary: Did the universe begin with a Big Bang or a Big Bounce? Did the Universe even "begin" at all?
Video.title: A Bouncing Universe

Video.summary: Imagine a world where the sun's light fades.
Video.title: What if the Sun Dimmed Down?

Image.alt: What if the Sun Dimmed Down?
What if the Sun Dimmed Down?
What if the Sun Dimmed Down?

Video.summary: Explore the thrilling scenario of detonating an asteroid in space to prevent a potential Earth impact.
Video.title: Blowing Up an Asteroid

Video.summary: Steve Levin joins to explore the cosmic implications if Jupiter never existed.
Video.title: Jupiter Never Existed

Video.summary: For over half a century, we've searched for radio signals from extraterrestrial civilizations.
Video.title: Have We Already Made First Contact?

Image.alt: Have We Already Made First Contact?
Have We Already Made First Contact?
Have We Already Made First Contact?

Video.summary: On the Kardashev scale we're a Type 0, but we're closer than ever to harnessing Earth's resources.
Video.title: Becoming a Type II Civilization

Video.summary: Do you ever wake up thinking, here we go again? Same stuff, different day? Welcome to the Causal Loop.
Video.title: Stuck in a Time Loop

Video.summary: Join us as we experience the extreme depths of our planet and dive into Earth's deepest mysteries.
Video.title: Exploring the Deepest Places on Earth

Image.alt: Exploring the Deepest Places on Earth
Exploring the Deepest Places on Earth
Exploring the Deepest Places on Earth

Video.summary: Do you drink energy drinks? Do you drink them everyday? Do you drink multiple ones everyday?
Video.title: Addicted to Energy Drinks

Video.summary: Step back in time to Ancient Egypt! Explore daily life, the pyramids, and the pharaohs.
Video.title: Living in Ancient Egypt

Video.summary: Discover the implications of having a brain twice its size: enhanced intelligence, memory, or new abilities?
Video.title: Your Brain, But Twice the Size!

Image.alt: Your Brain, But Twice the Size!
Your Brain, But Twice the Size!
Your Brain, But Twice the Size!

Video.summary: The logistics and challenges of a mass evacuation from Earth.
Video.title: Evacuating Earth

Video.summary: Imagine life on a Super Earth: exploring its massive landscapes, intense gravity, and how humans might adapt.
Video.title: What If We Lived on a Super Earth?

Image.alt: What If We Lived on a Super Earth?
What If We Lived on a Super Earth?
What If We Lived on a Super Earth?

Video.summary: Life inside a closed biosphere: exploring sustainability, ecosystem interactions, and the human experience.
Video.title: Living in a Closed Biosphere

Video.summary: Journey to the edge of the unknown as we explore what it might look like to see through a black hole.
Video.title: Seeing Through a Black Hole

Video.summary: Imagine 'Among Us' in real life: uncovering the suspense and strategies of identifying impostors.
Video.title: Among Us' IRL

Video.summary: The cosmic implications if all matter was replaced by antimatter, delving into potential changes in physics.
Video.title: Replacing Matter with Antimatter

Video.summary: What do we really know about octopuses? For starters, they don't have 8 tentacles-they're called arms.
Video.title: My Teacher the Octopus

Video.summary: Wild experiments and extreme stunts. Explore amazing feats that push the boundaries of science and safety.
Video.title: Don't Try This At Home

Video.summary: Explore the fascinating adaptations of life, from rapid evolution to sleepless survival and enduring tremors.
Video.title: Time After Time: Evolving Fast, Never Sleeping, and Enduring Earthquakes

Image.alt: Time After Time: Evolving Fast, Never Sleeping, and Enduring Earthquakes
Time After Time: Evolving Fast, Never Sleeping, and Enduring Earthquakes
Time After Time: Evolving Fast, Never Sleeping, and Enduring Earthquakes

Video.summary: Discover how humans and animals survive nature’s most lethal challenges, from predators to natural disasters!
Video.title: Staying Alive: Facing Nature's Deadliest Dangers

Image.alt: Staying Alive: Facing Nature's Deadliest Dangers
Staying Alive: Facing Nature's Deadliest Dangers
Staying Alive: Facing Nature's Deadliest Dangers

Video.summary: Explore the fascinating ways our bodies generate, store, and use energy.
Video.title: Born Again: Powering our Bodies

Video.summary: Take a deep dive into the science of breath-holding, exploring human limits, underwater feats, and
Video.title: Don't hold your breath

Video.summary: Explore potential solar disasters and their impact on Earth in 'How the Sun Could Go Wrong'!
Video.title: How the Sun could go wrong

Image.alt: How the Sun could go wrong
How the Sun could go wrong
How the Sun could go wrong

Video.summary: Journey through the history and technology behind mankind's moon landings. Witness the milestones of lunar exp
Video.title: Moon Landings

Video.summary: Watch as we explore the outrageous outcomes of nuking unusual targets in 'Nuke It'!
Video.title: Nuke It: An Explosive Episode

Video.summary: The astounding true story of one warm-hearted, stubborn man’s visionary quest to find a cure for cancer.
Video.title: Jim Allison: Breakthrough

Video.summary: Relive the historic moment when humanity reached the moon for the first time.
Video.title: First to the Moon

Video.summary: In an unremarkable office space, a select group of aging engineers ensures a legendary spacecraft lives on.
Video.title: It's Quieter in the Twilight
